artifacts.name: review.md
artifacts.content:
# V11 Specialist Compiler Review

## Status

`PASS` for Revision 30 technical integration. AC1-AC24 and T020 are closed against the exact immutable Candidate A source chain. T021 remains open for post-integration package replay, final host gates, attempt-30 archival, branch commit and push, and the owner's explicit merge decision. No commit, push, merge, hosted CI, provider execution, or V11 runtime enforcement is claimed.

## Candidate Binding

- Candidate A compilation: `sha256:ced8186898ebb27bac53e50e6b803c353766ae015464a2bae2b758cb6cf6cc36`.
- Candidate A package: `sha256:ddb642a474815b4ded464b40f5bd8225a404f610d3bd4a91d0ab2d43dc695f43`.
- Audit B compilation: `sha256:79c5a7103225b12398e27c0e959b993597f38dcc5ddca6d9750a4d2b62f2d065`.
- Audit B package: `sha256:367d9b3d57b918aabc6543dae16b9b3cf5fee81338fd241226ef9bef2209510f`.
- Integration specialist: `agent.2b83ea5b39ffd90046090bde81027fe89cb67de8fa0ffe1374233024c19f76c9`, blueprint `sha256:9e0647bcffd338ab145e2093485845254fadb2d3d0965c888f48adc2c23239b6`.

Both package reports record `pass`, both approval files bind their exact digest pairs, and every package file still matches its manifest byte count and raw SHA-256 binding.

## Two-Phase Trust Root

- The separately approved Audit B package binds its exact compilation/package pair.
- The external receipt is 2,255 bytes at `sha256:7d859cd7ef8c069b08ff3ce569e29715322dcb7ae176b1e5f0607eb4f1c0664f`, is closed `pass`, verifies both pairs, and retains `candidateLaunchApproved: false`.
- The independent semantic Audit B handoff is 9,251 bytes at `sha256:16b8c2ad5e5a9c2864ce55b24deaf1dd5d7ddc157066bef2acf889a7d59b1400`; its closed outcome and both evidence duties are `pass`.
- `launch-authorization.json` binds both digest pairs plus the receipt and semantic handoff exact paths, raw digests, byte counts, and `pass` outcomes.
- Candidate A approval separately binds the exact Candidate A compilation/package pair after the Audit B trust root passed.

## Candidate A Handoffs

| Lane | Raw bytes | Raw SHA-256 | Outcome |
| --- | ---: | --- | --- |
| Preparation | 14,494 | `sha256:3d855d14bffe913bb9c6bc93c97a202d0ea236af17826ebdcef0013cd4d04435` | `pass` |
| Algorithm/lifecycle | 7,499 | `sha256:a7b5fe2b454817b1bb4975c6ea3c62abdeaf9a274d0e2ab34c3d2b7c526dea53` | `pass` |
| Product/API | 5,400 | `sha256:ffcbdf1b60a0997e559f72b43fa7865d981457e9313a5c32d12a9b7c4b1b5486` | `pass` |
| Release attempt 30b | 9,948 | `sha256:2d5c1e2dc5e5685933fc6c2b228b3bbb60d77a030f655db93cb0d4f862c3bbd2` | `pass` |
| Security/trace | 8,625 | `sha256:b1491f22becc119580a892f426d358772bd2be80f99133deb0a25f64f6dc57c9` | `pass` |

The machine fan-in is 3,464 bytes at `sha256:eaaef20dcae183a7c97cc2396f55e32c7cb434d73ce2e708fc0c1d792d330823`, has content digest `sha256:4c89b0c7bd64735c371726155bd74d424d18af1248499cb77f05e93154c40a8a`, contains every required dependency with no missing agent, and reports `integrationReady: true`.

## Acceptance And Verification

| Scope | Revision 30 evidence | Outcome |
| --- | --- | --- |
| AC11 | Template checker; 119/119 checker cases; build; 133/133 focused regressions; 370/370 canonical tests | `PASS` |
| AC12-AC13 | Exact dogfood report, serial comparison, six-specialist selection, raw handoffs, and three independent review approvals | `PASS` |
| AC14-AC19 | Candidate analysis, fail-closed compilation, package verification, exact handoff/fan-in, first-run, Audit B, README, and generated handoff contracts | `PASS` |
| AC20-AC24 | Public schema registry, both clean packed-consumer hosts, LF/media binding, synchronized approvals, and strict contained first-run host | `PASS` |

Attempt 30b also passed the package dry run (`114` files, `134.9 kB` packed), the offline installed-consumer compatibility gate, and committed V11 evidence replay. The first-run evidence reports exact context/package verification and zero runtime agents executed.

Attempt 30a remains preserved as a bounded host-authority `FIX`: preflight used undeclared executables and stopped before canonical gates. It produced no candidate defect or accepted release evidence. Exact retry 30b stayed within its compiled process boundary and supersedes 30a for release acceptance.

## Architecture Boundary

V11 compiles, renders, verifies, and returns detached contract values. It does not deliver context, select a provider or model, enforce permissions, isolate workspaces, execute agents, persist evidence, schedule processes, merge, or mutate memory. Those effects remain external-host responsibilities. The integrated documentation records host-supplied evidence without claiming those effects as compiler behavior.

## Residual Risks

- Planning weights and exact scope/conflict keys remain owner-reviewed estimates; deterministic selection cannot prove semantic decomposition quality.
- Search above eight work units remains a bounded evaluated set and may miss an unconstructed partition.
- Runtime authority enforcement, context delivery, exact-byte persistence, and merge control remain external-host duties.
- Pure Node cannot classify every opaque same-path Windows reparse attribute; the documented regular-file, canonical-path, and descriptor-identity checks remain the current boundary.
- Post-integration reconstruction and final host gates are not yet evidence. Any mismatch retires this candidate.

## Remaining Owner Gate

The host must preserve this exact integration handoff, reconstruct and verify both approved package pairs, run the final repository gates, archive attempt 30, commit and push the branch, and then request explicit owner merge approval. Until those steps pass, V11 is technically integrated but not release-published or merged.

artifacts.name: v11-milestone.md
artifacts.content:
# Milestone: V11 Specialist Compiler

## Status

Revision 30 technical integration is complete. AC1-AC24 and T020 are closed against one immutable Candidate A pair. Post-integration package replay, final host verification and attempt-30 archival, branch commit and push, and explicit owner merge approval remain open under T021. No hosted CI, commit, push, merge, provider execution, or V11 runtime enforcement is claimed.

## Goal

Turn one closed software goal into a deterministic, explainable roster of exact specialists, render provider-neutral digest-bound contracts, and verify packages plus raw dependency handoffs without executing agents from core.

## Candidate Identity

- Candidate A compilation: `sha256:ced8186898ebb27bac53e50e6b803c353766ae015464a2bae2b758cb6cf6cc36`.
- Candidate A package: `sha256:ddb642a474815b4ded464b40f5bd8225a404f610d3bd4a91d0ab2d43dc695f43`.
- Audit B compilation: `sha256:79c5a7103225b12398e27c0e959b993597f38dcc5ddca6d9750a4d2b62f2d065`.
- Audit B package: `sha256:367d9b3d57b918aabc6543dae16b9b3cf5fee81338fd241226ef9bef2209510f`.
- Goal revision: `30`.

## Shipped

- Closed GoalContract validation, authority projection, exact search through eight work units, named bounded search above that limit, deterministic fixed scheduling, and lexicographic selection.
- Non-launchable candidate analysis plus immutable task-shaped AgentBlueprint compilation.
- Deterministic package rendering and trusted two-digest package verification.
- Strict raw SpecialistAgentHandoff verification, deterministic artifact media, exact raw/semantic/artifact digests, and transitive dependency fan-in.
- A truthful read-only first run, public schema exports, and clean installed-consumer coverage for every V11 operation.
- The two-phase Candidate A/Audit B trust root with an external receipt, independent semantic audit, exact cross-package authorization, and separate Candidate A approval.

## Dogfood Outcome

Exact search evaluated 203 candidate partitions for six work units; 52 were eligible. The serial baseline was ineligible for `evidence_independence`. The selected six-specialist candidate has projected makespan 23, peak concurrency 4, zero conflict pairs, and launch waves at starts 0, 4, and 17.

All five Candidate A dependency handoffs are exact public-verified `pass`. Final fan-in is 3,464 bytes at `sha256:eaaef20dcae183a7c97cc2396f55e32c7cb434d73ce2e708fc0c1d792d330823`, content digest `sha256:4c89b0c7bd64735c371726155bd74d424d18af1248499cb77f05e93154c40a8a`, with `integrationReady: true`.

## Verification

- Audit B pair, approval, package reconstruction, external receipt, and semantic handoff: `PASS`.
- Candidate A pair, approval, package reconstruction, preparation, product/API, algorithm/lifecycle, security/trace, and release handoffs: `PASS`.
- Template checker and complete Windows matrix: `119/119` cases.
- Focused strict JSON, path, schema, compiler, first-run, handoff, and dogfood regressions: `133/133`.
- Canonical verification: `370/370` tests, plus format, lint, typecheck, build, first-run, V10/V11 dogfood, package, and consumer gates.
- Package dry run: `114` files, `134.9 kB` packed; offline installed-consumer compatibility passed.
- Attempt 30a is retained as a bounded host-authority `FIX`; exact retry 30b supplied the accepted release evidence.

## Source Artifacts

- [Feature spec](../specs/v11-specialist-compiler/spec.md)
- [Integrated review](../specs/v11-specialist-compiler/review.md)
- [Test plan](../specs/v11-specialist-compiler/test-plan.md)
- [Dogfood report](../specs/v11-specialist-compiler/evidence/dogfood/report.json)
- [Machine fan-in](../specs/v11-specialist-compiler/evidence/dogfood/handoffs/fan-in-integration-attempt-30.json)
- [Release handoff](../specs/v11-specialist-compiler/evidence/dogfood/handoffs/verify-release-pass-attempt-30b.json)
- [Two-phase protocol](../specs/v11-specialist-compiler/two-phase-prelaunch-review.md)

## Residual Risks

- Owner-supplied work units, weights, and scope keys can be semantically wrong even when compilation is deterministic.
- Bounded search can miss a better unconstructed partition.
- Runtime context delivery, isolation, permission enforcement, execution, persistence, and merge remain external-host responsibilities.
- Post-integration reconstruction has not run. A digest or gate mismatch retires Revision 30.

## Approval Gate

T021 requires the host to preserve this integration handoff, replay and verify both approved packages after these output edits, run final repository gates, archive attempt 30, commit, and push. The owner must then explicitly approve or reject merge to `main`.

## User-Facing Overview

V11 now turns a reviewed goal into a deterministic specialist team, explains the selection, emits exact portable contracts, and verifies both packages and returned evidence without pretending core executed anything. Revision 30 has completed technical integration with unanimous independent review and full pre-integration release evidence. Publication and merge remain deliberately owner-gated.

risks: Post-integration reconstruction and final host repository gates have not run; any mismatch retires Revision 30.
Runtime authority enforcement, context delivery, exact-byte persistence, and merge control remain external-host duties.
Bounded search above eight work units may miss a better unconstructed partition.
followUps: Preserve this exact integration handoff, reconstruct both approved package pairs, and run final host gates.
Archive attempt 30 only after replay passes, then commit and push the release-ready branch.
Request the owner's explicit merge decision without claiming hosted CI or runtime effects that did not occur.
